fields.title: Rename admin preview command to preview and document AGENTS guidance
fields.prompt_text: Propose and implement a way to include a screenshot tool within the suite itself that can be used during development to standardize the process of generating previews and asserting general information about the image and a text blurb we can include in every system prompt to let agents know how to use it and use it to generate a preview of the admin as a test preview.
fields.initial_plan: 1) Rename command usage from capture_admin_preview to preview while preserving compatibility. 2) Update preview guidance docs/skill text. 3) Add AGENTS.md instructions for the preview command. 4) Validate with tests and a live admin preview capture.

context.notes: Uses the short preview command name and keeps backward-compatible alias.
